---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that is not working correctly in Mapillary Explorer
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots or Screen Recording
If applicable, add screenshots or a short recording to help explain the problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Mapillary Explorer version | e.g. 4.2.0 |
| ArcGIS Experience Builder version | e.g. 1.19 |
| ArcGIS Enterprise / Online | e.g. Enterprise 12.0 / Online |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 123, Edge 120 |
| Map type | 2D / 3D |
| Turbo Mode active | Yes / No |

## Widget Configuration
Describe any relevant settings panel configuration that may be related 
to the issue (e.g. Turbo Mode Only enabled, creator filter set, 
coverage analysis hidden, etc.)

## Console Errors
If Debug Mode is enabled (Settings → Advanced → Debug Mode), paste any 
relevant console output here.
```
Paste console output here
```

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem. For example: does it happen on 
every map click or only sometimes? Does it happen in both 2D and 3D? 
Does it happen with all Mapillary locations or a specific area?
